scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] RSeq: 1 Require: 100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] From: [$4] To: [$5];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> ontent-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$3] From: [$4] To: [$5];tag=2 Call-ID: [$6] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687639 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20
